name: The Seattle War - RPG
description:
When the Iron Alliance came up from the South, the Wardens thought them as little more than another group of raiders to be easily dealt with. No one, not even the Iron Alliance, expected such widespread support from the populace for these newcomers, bringing along hundreds of recruits. Now caught on the back foot, the Wardens scramble to properly mobilize their forces to face their greatest threat yet.

So choose your side, whether it be the Wardens of the White, the Iron Alliance, a small Raider gang you yourself lead, or even just a simple wastelandsr trying to get by.
creator: Helixus
